concept: Peacemaker / One Who Embodies Grounded Peace
description: A person who actively brings about peace by their presence and actions. They work to end conflict, soothe tensions, and restore harmony within the community.
rationale: A composition of the roots 'she' (gentle focus), 'a' (presence), and 'ma' (grounded presence). The word's structure suggests 'one who brings a gentle, grounded presence,' defining a peacemaker by their ability to embody and manifest a calming, peaceful presence.
